content_body: The house was just as described—it is quite amazing. Plenty of room for all 9 of our guests to sleep and enjoy North Georgia. The outdoor deck was great as we used the provided grill every day for food. Though we were close to town we preferred to just stay in and make our meals while playing some bocce and disc golf near the fire pit. I can imagine this being the perfect getaway during the winter as the fire pit would be perfect for gathering around. I wish I had found them sooner, but there are TONS of blackberry bushes in front of the house to the left when looking at it from the road, the ripe ones were delicious. I would definitely consider coming back to this property.
title: Just As Described—Amazing
